name: Port Scanner
description: Lists all open TCP ports and the processes using them
author: AgentOS

steps.command: Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, OwningProcess | Sort-Object LocalPort | ForEach-Object { $proc = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{Port=$_.LocalPort; Address=$_.LocalAddress; Process=$proc.Name; PID=$_.OwningProcess} } | Format-Table -AutoSize
